creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)
Unfortunately, this particular vendor does not offer an open issue-tracker. Their bug-reporting web-page -- http://www.apcupsd.org/wordpress/bug-reporting/ -- asks for bug-reports to be submitted to a mailing list, which is what I did.

I have not received neither response nor a bounce, and my message is not (yet?) listed in the archives at https://sourceforge.net/p/apcupsd/mailman/apcupsd-users/?viewmonth=201511 .

Hopefully, it has not been eaten by a spam filter...
